  • 方法详细资料

    • isSingleplayer

      public boolean isSingleplayer()

    • getServerName

      public String getServerName()

    • getDuration

      public int getDuration()
      Duration of the replay in milliseconds.

    • getDate

      public long getDate()
      Unix timestamp of when the recording was started in milliseconds.

    • getMcversion

      public String getMcversion()
      Minecraft version. (E.g. 1.8)

    • getFileFormat

      public String getFileFormat()
      File format. Defaults to 'MCPR'

    • getFileFormatVersion

      public int getFileFormatVersion()

    • getProtocol

      public int getProtocol()
      Minecraft protocol version. Mandatory for `fileFormatVersion >= 13`.

    • getGenerator

      public String getGenerator()

    • getSelfId

      public int getSelfId()
      The entity id of the player manually added to this replay which represents the recording player. Must be a valid entity id (e.g. must not be -1). May not be set.

    • getPlayers

      public List<String> getPlayers()
      Array of UUIDs of all players which can be seen in this replay.

    • getZenithProxyVersion

      public String getZenithProxyVersion()

    • getZenithProxyCommit

      public String getZenithProxyCommit()

    • getZenithProxyMCVersion

      public String getZenithProxyMCVersion()

    • setDuration

      public void setDuration(int duration)
      Duration of the replay in milliseconds.

    • setDate

      public void setDate(long date)
      Unix timestamp of when the recording was started in milliseconds.

    • setMcversion

      public void setMcversion(String mcversion)
      Minecraft version. (E.g. 1.8)

    • setProtocol

      public void setProtocol(int protocol)
      Minecraft protocol version. Mandatory for `fileFormatVersion >= 13`.

    • setSelfId

      public void setSelfId(int selfId)
      The entity id of the player manually added to this replay which represents the recording player. Must be a valid entity id (e.g. must not be -1). May not be set.

    • setPlayers

      public void setPlayers(List<String> players)
      Array of UUIDs of all players which can be seen in this replay.
